title: Sollividu Velli Nilave Song Lyrics Amaidhi Padai
stanzas:
<div>
Sollividu Velli Nilave Song Lyrics Amaidhi Padai

sollividu velli nilave
sollugindra seidhigalaiye (2)

uravugal kasaindhathammaa
oh oh kanavugal
kalaindhathammaa

kadhal ennum dheepame
kannil naanum yetrinen
kaatril kaaindhu ponapin
naane ennai thaetrinen.

sollividu velli nilave
sollugindra seidhigalaiye

uravugal kasaindhidumaa ?
oh oh kanavugal
kalaindhidumaa?

unnai orupodhum
ullam maravaadhu
naanthaan vaazhnthaen
o o o..

kuttram puriyaadhu
thunbakadal meedhu
yaen naan veezhnthen
o o o o

andha kadhai mudintha kadhai
enthan manam marandha kadhai
enna seiya vidikathai pol
ennudaiya pirandha kadhai

kaalangal thaan pona pinnum
kaayangal aaravillai o o
vedhanai theeravillai.

sollividu velli nilave
sollugindra seidhigalaiye

uravugal kasaindhidumaa ?
oh oh kanavugal
kalaindhidumaa? (2)

thotta kuraiyaavum
vitta kuraiyaagum
vendaam kadhal o o o

endhan vazhi veru
undhan vazhi veru
yeno koodal o o o

unnudaiya varavai enni
ullavarai kathiruppen
ennai vittu vilagi sendraal
marupadi theek kuzhippen

naan virumbum kadhalane
nee ennai yaetrukondaal
naan boomiyil vazhndhiruppen.

sollividu velli nilave
sollugindra seidhigalaiye

uravugal kasaindhathammaa
oh oh kanavugal
kalaindhathammaa

kadhal ennum dheepame
kannil naanum yetrinen
kaatril saaindhu pogumaa

sollividu velli nilave
sollugindra seidhigalaiye

uravugal kasaindhathammaa

kalaindhathammaa

kalaindhidumaa?

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, highlighting the beauty of relationships.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Amaidhi Padai, the song reflects the protagonist's feelings and romantic journey.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the melodious voices of Mano and Swarnalatha.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Sollividu Velli Nilave was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

When was this song released?

The song was released on March 5, 1994.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Sollividu Velli Nilave from Amaidhi Padai encapsulates the tender emotions of love and connection. It portrays the protagonist's reflections on relationships, evoking a sense of nostalgia and warmth. The soothing melody, combined with heartfelt lyrics, creates an atmosphere perfect for romantic moments. This timeless classic continues to resonate with listeners, making it a cherished piece in Tamil music history.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sollividu Velli Nilave from Amaidhi Padai is a timeless melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Mano and Swarnalatha, this song resonates with anyone who has ever experienced the magic of romance. The masterful composition by Ilaiyaraaja adds a rich layer of nostalgia, making it a must-listen for fans of classic Tamil music.
stanzaMeanings: The silver moon is telling stories.
Are relationships breaking apart? Oh oh, are dreams fading away?
Are bonds breaking? Oh oh, are dreams blending together?
The light of love, I have reached in my eyes, I have flown in the wind, I have searched for myself.
The silver moon is telling stories.
Are relationships breaking apart? Oh oh, are dreams fading away?
I will never forget you, I have lived for you, oh oh oh..
I fell into the sea of troubles, why did I fall? Oh oh oh oh
That story ended, my heart forgot that story, what can I do about my birth story?
Time has passed, but the pain remains, oh oh, the suffering doesn't end.
The silver moon is telling stories.
Are relationships breaking apart? Oh oh, are dreams fading away?
No need for shortcomings or losses in love, oh oh.
My way is different, your way is different, why is there a connection? Oh oh oh.
I will wait for your arrival, if you leave me, I will fall into the pit again.
If you love me, I will live on this earth.
The silver moon is telling stories.
Are relationships breaking apart? Oh oh, are dreams fading away?
The light of love, I have reached in my eyes, will it flow in the wind? I have placed it in my heart and searched for it.
The silver moon is telling stories.
Are relationships breaking apart? Oh oh, are dreams fading away?
Are relationships breaking apart? Oh oh, are dreams fading away?
